summary: Reviewed unfinished DinoBrain OS improvement plan against user intent, current docs, verify:goal output, and valid subagent objections. Created docs/OS_UNFINISHED_IMPROVEMENT_REVIEW_20260708.md, integrated every valid REVISE_REQUIRED objection, committed and pushed app commit f698d03. Final 10-agent agreement was not claimed because repeated subagent final outputs returned completed=null, including a one-word control prompt.
decisions: Do not count completed=null subagent outputs as agreement.
Do not claim 10/10 consensus until ten non-empty AGREE results are returned in the same round.
Treat valid REVISE_REQUIRED findings as blockers and integrate them into the unfinished improvement document.

Current blocker summary: task lifecycle/settlement, real semantic RAG plus generated answer quality eval, Observatory/health parity, source-lineage false-green risk, behavior recall trigger coverage, install/release hard gates, public-data policy unification.
next_steps: Repair or replace subagent review mechanism, then rerun ten-agent final agreement against docs/OS_UNFINISHED_IMPROVEMENT_REVIEW_20260708.md.
Implement P0-A task lifecycle and finish gate cleanup.
Add real semantic retrieval and generated-answer quality evaluation.
Add verify:answer-quality, verify:observatory-evidence, verify:install-equivalence, and verify:release-manifest and wire them into verify:goal.
